etymology.description: A Chinese personal name, typically consisting of a family name followed by two given names.
etymology.interpretation: 李(李) (Lǐ, "a common Chinese surname") is one of the most common Chinese surnames, originating from the plum tree. 旭(旭) (xù, "dawn; rising sun") represents the rising sun and often symbolizes new beginnings or hope. 婷(婷) (tíng, "graceful; elegant; attractive") suggests grace and elegance. Together, the name 李旭婷 (Lǐ Xùtíng) combines the common surname 李(李) with a given name evoking the hopeful beauty of a new dawn and grace, typical for personal names that reflect positive attributes or aspirations for the individual.

examples.chinese: 李旭婷(李旭婷)是我的好朋友(是我的好朋友)。
examples.pinyin: Lǐ Xùtíng shì wǒ de hǎo péngyǒu.
examples.english: Li Xuting is my good friend.

examples.chinese: 我昨天见到了李旭婷(我昨天見到了李旭婷)，她看起来很开心(她看起來很開心)。
examples.pinyin: Wǒ zuótiān jiàn dào le Lǐ Xùtíng, tā kàn qǐlái hěn kāixīn.
examples.english: I met Li Xuting yesterday, she looked very happy.

examples.chinese: 李旭婷(李旭婷)喜欢旅行(喜歡旅行)，她去过很多国家(她去過很多國家)。
examples.pinyin: Lǐ Xùtíng xǐhuān lǚxíng, tā qù guò hěn duō guójiā.
examples.english: Li Xuting likes traveling, she has visited many countries.
